subcodes.title: Words to Juliet Thompson et al, spoken on 1909-07-09
subcodes.first_line: Consider what the power of the Covenant has done! It was an impossibility for a Zoroastrian to unite with a Sid and a mulla with a Jew.
subcodes.subjects: @role of the Covenant in preserving unity, @unity in diversity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @martyrs and martyrdom
